modifier_text:
Assume that the ticket was created by an end user through a self-service form submission and that the person who created it speaks English as their first language.
You should write the description in a narrative style and use a casual conversational tone. The writing should have very limited detail and show limited technical understanding. There should be no spelling errors and some uncertain technical terminology.
raw_text:
short_description_text: Need a local account for a shared Windows 10 workstation

full_description_text:  
I'm looking to set up a local account on a Windows 10 computer. We need a general login for a shared workstation that multiple people will use. Can you help with getting that set up?
short_description: Need a local account for a shared Windows 10 workstation
description: I'm looking to set up a local account on a Windows 10 computer. We need a general login for a shared workstation that multiple people will use. Can you help with getting that set up?
